title: RISC-V Studio
description: A complete RV32IMAF + Zicsr assembler, cycle-stepping emulator, and time-travel debugger in the browser — now with a from-scratch C compiler that lowers a real subset of C (structs, pointers, function pointers, variadic printf) to RISC-V and runs it on the same machine. Plus IEEE-754 float, atomics, CSR counters, a memory-mapped framebuffer, syscall console, disassembler, shareable links, and an in-app verification suite.
